name: Ottone Pesante (IT) + Forderva (NO)
description:
After the incredible success of Inferno Festival Mattinè in 2023, Italian trio comes back to Brewgata for exclusive show!

Ottone Pesante is an instrumental, experimental trio. From their early works, they produced an inimitable and highly original sound characterized by the extensive and increasing use of electronics on the brass instruments and equally recognizable drumming with strong roots in both grindcore and rhythmic/timbral exploration. 

Check out more at:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/2Ifb4fzQbvzu3uGGlaAjk2?si=vwY7rMmPRUWE_0hUTrV0dA

YouTube: https://youtube.com/@ottonepesante?si=l70Wf_y12OfDruU0

Special Guest: FORDERVA

Forderva is a new blackened improvised doom band that crawled out from the moldy corners of the Oslo noise scene. Baritone guitar, drums, vocals, and noise pedals collide in poetic chaos.

250 Nok
20 yo
